title: Kapata Nataka Paatradhaari
overview: Krishna, an auto driver, sets up a ruse to help his girlfriend, Rukmini, but both of them end up getting caught in it. Soon strange, ghostly things start happening around him. A story that is equal parts romance and horror, this movie will keep you on the edge of your seat.
